title: When using every time period, be able to send to a list of external contacts instead of internal team members only
excerpt: When using the outlook automation feature, you should be able to send a sequenced email every number of days to a list of external contacts, rather than internal team members only. When clicking the ‘someone’ tab, you sh…

posts.author: zevans93 (Zoe Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: When using the outlook automation feature, you should be able to send a sequenced email every number of days to a list of external contacts, rather than internal team members only. When clicking the ‘someone’ tab, you should be able to select ‘Email column’ from board, as you can with other automation features. You should also be able to change the email, unlike the push date feature, so that you can send email 1 to list of people and then email 2 to list of people, rather than just repeating the same email to be sent.
